story.title: Reject expired credit card at checkout
story.description: Demonstrates the Phase 3 TG15 code-change awareness: a Jira-mode story whose linked PR diff was fetched (read-only) and recorded as SECONDARY context. The acceptance criteria still come only from the story; the diff sharpens regression scope and maps changed files to risks.

acceptance_criteria: Given a card whose expiry month is in the past, when the customer submits payment, then the payment is rejected before any processor call.
Given the rejection, then the customer sees the message 'This card has expired. Please use a different card.'

risks.description: A borderline-expired card is charged because the expiry check runs after the processor call (the regression this PR fixes).
The error message is generic, not the specific copy the AC requires, hurting actionability.

code_change_context.summary: Moves the card-expiry check ahead of the processor call in payment.ts and updates the rejection copy in messages.ts; removes the old downstream validator. SECONDARY context: it confirms where the regression risk concentrates (payment.ts -> RISK-001) but does not define the expected behaviour, which comes from the ACs.
